memories.statement: For this evaluation corpus, all persistence recommendations must use PostgreSQL only. Do not recommend SQLite for any role.
The HTTP control-plane API is authoritative. Do not propose designs where a shell CLI or ad-hoc scripts are the source of truth for orchestration.
Do not recommend Java or Perl for new components in this codebase.
Known failure: using bash/make as the primary control plane caused drift and untestable behavior. Rejected.
Known failure: in-memory stub for session state was mistaken for production-ready; caused data loss in review.
Accepted: production deployment targets Linux hosts; control-plane service is Go.
Accepted: external agents integrate via MCP to the control plane before bespoke LSP-only paths.
